name: Warmly
description: Full-stack AI sales agent that identifies high-intent buying signals and autonomously executes personalized outreach campaigns. Agents detect prospect intent, personalize emails, manage follow-up sequences, and book qualified meetings without human intervention.
capabilities: Real-time buying signal detection (website visits, CRM activity, LinkedIn engagement)
Autonomous email personalization by role/pain point/funnel stage
Automatic follow-up sequencing with dynamic optimization
Website visitor identification and intent tracking
AI Chatbot with lead qualification and meeting booking
Live video handoff to human reps
pricing: Free tier (500 website visitors/month); Paid plans start at $10,000/year (AI Data Agent) to $25,000+/year (Marketing Ops Agent)
notes: Operates as digital SDR for B2B sales. 250M+ contact database. Component-based pricing model (pay per output). Covers entire workflow: intent detection → personalization → follow-up → booking. Integrates with CRM and sales stack.
